title: foundation — scheduled tasks
description: Two base scheduled tasks. Every entry runs `runOnOneServer` (multi-node worker pools do not duplicate work) + `withoutOverlapping` where windows may exceed the interval.

entries.description: Every 5 minutes. Runs the aggregate health probe walk + snapshots the result to Redis for the platform.health broadcast channel. Downstream ops dashboards subscribe.

Weekly Sunday 03:00 UTC. Rebuilds every Searchable model's index from scratch. Guards against index-drift bugs where a model change was missed. Idempotent — runs after replication window so read replicas see fresh data first.
Daily 02:00 UTC. Prunes failed job records older than 30 days and dead-letter queue entries older than 90 days. Keeps horizon dashboards responsive.
